summary: A short black-and-white montage with a vignette border and white serif text captions over faded photographs of people. Captions read These are victims of illegal immigration, This Is Who We Fight For, and DHS Fights for the Innocent. Small text at the bottom of the final frame reads Sponsored by the United States Department of Homeland Security.

script.scene: Caption These are victims of illegal immigration over a faded photo of a smiling woman.
Caption This Is Who We Fight For over a photo of an adult holding a child.
Caption DHS Fights for the Innocent; small text reads Sponsored by the United States Department of Homeland Security.

notable_text: These are victims of illegal immigration; This Is Who We Fight For; DHS Fights for the Innocent; Sponsored by the United States Department of Homeland Security
